entities.description: As a subsection of 'Preliminaries' within the BookRAG paper, this section formalizes the foundational Information Foraging Theory (IFT) used to model user behavior in complex document QA tasks.
A theoretical framework explaining how individuals seek information efficiently, serving as the conceptual basis for the system's design discussed in section 3.2.

relations.description: The concept of 'Information Foraging Theory' is the primary subject matter detailed in section 3.2.
